steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The crucial phrase is “evidence of early impacts may no longer be present.” This tells us the Moon's surface can't preserve or show evidence from those early times. The blank needs a word meaning to show or display evidence of.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Reflect means to show or be evidence of — the surface can't display evidence of early impacts because that evidence has vanished. The other three don't fit this meaning: receive (accepting), evaluate (assessing), mimic (copying). That matches choice A — A is correct.
